Index

Modules: constants, units, utils.

API symbols

`$`:
  • units: `$`[T: SomeUnit](s: T): string
`<=`:
  • units: `<=`[T: SomeUnit | SomeNumber; U: SomeUnit | SomeNumber](x: T; y: U): untyped
`<`:
  • units: `<`[T: SomeUnit | SomeNumber; U: SomeUnit | SomeNumber](x: T; y: U): untyped
`*`:
  • units: `*`[T: SomeUnit | SomeNumber; U: SomeUnit | SomeNumber](x: T; y: U): untyped
`+`:
  • units: `+`[T: SomeUnit | SomeNumber; U: SomeUnit | SomeNumber](x: T; y: U): untyped
`-`:
  • units: `-`[T: SomeUnit | SomeNumber; U: SomeUnit | SomeNumber](x: T; y: U): untyped
`.`:
  • units: `.`[T: SomeUnit | SomeNumber](x: T; y: untyped): untyped
`/`:
  • units: `/`[T: SomeUnit | SomeNumber; U: SomeUnit | SomeNumber](x: T; y: U): untyped
`==`:
  • units: `==`[T: SomeUnit; U: SomeUnit](x: T; y: U): bool
`^`:
  • utils: `^`(x: untyped; num: static int): untyped
`as`:
  • units: as
